case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JANICE VO

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100050495)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT VO, JANICE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-23-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-10-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
